extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won in a photo finish against Groenewegen after mechanical issues in final corner forced him to rely on pure momentum rather than power delivery.
tactical_patterns: Bennett positioned aggressively from 60km out despite energy cost, revealing pre-emptive safety-over-efficiency calculation in crash-heavy conditions.
Groenewegen attacked right side while Bennett went left in finale, both isolated without trains—showing leadout collapse pattern.
Phillips/Groenewegen/Rolands all present but uncoordinated in finale—Jumbo-Visma/Movistar unable to organize against solo Bennett approach.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: won three consecutive sprints (unprecedented in race history) while managing mechanical in final corner through bike-lengthening technique
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: neutral: matched Bennett to line without leadout support but positioning choice (right side) may have cost millimeters
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: led out finale with train presence but faded to third, unable to convert organizational advantage
rider_signals.ROLANDS Jürgen: positive: fourth place plus bonus seconds collection shows consistent top-5 finishing without sprint train investment
